Sam Pronove
E S L T E AC H E R

Professional ESL Teacher with a passion or student learning and eight years of experience
in various education environments in the USA and abroad. Exemplary teaching skills
substantiated by a 100% pass rate streak for the last eight years. Currently completing
a Master s Degree in Curriculum and Instruction.
